Interface IDEUtilityNetwork

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that supply utility network data element information.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("911DBBD5-4EA9-4EA4-99F2-447055CC2BAD")]
public interface IDEUtilityNetwork

Properties

Categories

Returns the categories of the utility network. The 'Subnetwork Source' and 'Subnetwork Sink' categories are always included.

IArray Categories { get; }

Property Value

IArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

DomainNetworks

Returns the array of domain networks in this utility network.

IArray DomainNetworks { get; }

Property Value

IArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

ServiceTerritoryFeatureClassName

Returns the service territory feature class name.

string ServiceTerritoryFeatureClassName { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ServiceTerritoryFeatureLayerID

Returns the service territory feature layer ID.

int ServiceTerritoryFeatureLayerID { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

SystemJunctionObjectSource

Returns the system junction object source in this utility network.

INetworkSource SystemJunctionObjectSource { get; }

Property Value

INetworkSource

Examples

Sample Snippet

TerminalConfigurationByID[int]

Returns the terminal configuration by ID.

ITerminalConfiguration TerminalConfigurationByID[int ID] { get; }

Parameters

ID int

Property Value

ITerminalConfiguration

Examples

Sample Snippet

TerminalConfigurations

Returns the array of terminal configurations in the utility network.

IArray TerminalConfigurations { get; }

Property Value

IArray
